request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't afford to wait any longer. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant—it's about protecting our families and communities. We've built this nation on resilience; let's not compromise it now. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
